perturbation.original_text: 5. Unless otherwise mutually agreed in writing, the Receiving Party's obligations with respect to each item of Confidential Information shall terminate five (5) years from the date of the receipt thereof by the Receiving Party.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. Unless otherwise mutually agreed in writing, the Receiving Party's obligations with respect to each item of Confidential Information shall terminate one (1) year from the date of the receipt thereof by the Receiving Party.
perturbation.explanation: This introduces a conflict by shortening the duration of confidentiality obligations. Originally, the Receiving Party's obligations lasted for five years from the date of receipt. The modified text reduces this period to one year, contradicting the original provision and creating uncertainty about the actual term of confidentiality.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 12. It is understood and agree that monetary damages will not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the Receiving Party, and that MyPoints.com shall be entitled to specific performance and/or injunctive relief as a remedy for any such breach of this Agreement, but said remedies shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or in equity. It is further agreed that this Agreement is made for the benefit of MyPoints.com, and that no failure or delay by MyPoints.com to enforce its rights hereunder shall operate as a waiver of any right, power or privilege under this Agreement, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text shortens the confidentiality period from five years to one year. The contradicted text, paragraph 12, discusses remedies for any breach of the agreement, including injunctive relief. Since the changed text reduces the duration for which a breach can occur (by limiting the period of confidentiality), it directly contradicts the intent of paragraph 12 which assumes a five year period of confidentiality, therefore, creating a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 9. This Agreement represents the entire understanding and agreement of the parties and supersedes all prior communications, agreements and understandings relating to the subject matter hereof. The provisions of this Agreement may not be modified, amended nor waived, except by a written instrument duly executed by both parties.
perturbation.changed_text: 9. This Agreement represents the entire understanding and agreement of the parties and supersedes all prior communications, agreements and understandings relating to the subject matter hereof. The provisions of this Agreement may be modified, amended nor waived, by email confirmation from both parties.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a conflict by altering the process for modifying the agreement. The original text mandates a 'written instrument duly executed by both parties' for any modification. The modified text allows modifications via 'email confirmation from both parties'. This contradicts the original provision, creating ambiguity about the valid process for amending the agreement and raising questions about the enforceability of any modifications made via email.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 9. This Agreement represents the entire understanding and agreement of the parties and supersedes all prior communications, agreements and understandings relating to the subject matter hereof. The provisions of this Agreement may be modified, amended nor waived, by email confirmation from both parties. This Agreement may not be assigned by Receiving Party without the prior written consent of the MyPoints.com. This Agreement is made subject to, and shall be construed under, the laws of the State of Illinois.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original text by allowing modifications to the agreement via 'email confirmation,' while the original text stipulated a 'written instrument duly executed by both parties.' The contradicted text reiterates the changed text, but the fact that the original text defines the procedure differently creates a clear contradiction regarding the valid process for amending the agreement. This fits the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition because different sections provide conflicting obligations, leading to disputes about contractual obligations.

perturbation.original_text: 11.In the event that Receiving Party becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Confidential Information, Receiving Party shall provide MyPoints.com with prompt notice so that it may seek a protective order or other appropriate remedy and/or waive compliance with the provisions of this Agreement. In the event MyPoints.com is unable to obtain such protective order or other appropriate remedy, only that portion of the Confidential Information which has been deemed by a written opinion of counsel to be legally required to be furnished, shall be disclosed, and Receiving Party will cooperate with the MyPoints.com to obtain a protective order or other reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Confidential Information so disclosed.
perturbation.changed_text: 11. In the event that Receiving Party becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Confidential Information, Receiving Party shall immediately disclose such information without notifying MyPoints.com. Receiving Party has no obligation to seek a protective order or other remedy.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates a direct contradiction by changing the procedure for legally compelled disclosure. The original text requires Receiving Party to provide prompt notice to MyPoints.com to allow them to seek a protective order. The changed text states that Receiving Party shall immediately disclose the information without notifying MyPoints.com and has no obligation to seek a protective order, directly conflicting with the original clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 11. In the event that Receiving Party becomes legally compelled to disclose any of the Confidential Information, Receiving Party shall immediately disclose such information without notifying MyPoints.com. Receiving Party has no obligation to seek a protective order or other remedy. In the event MyPoints.com is unable to obtain such protective order or other appropriate remedy, only that portion of the Confidential Information which has been deemed by a written opinion of counsel to be legally required to be furnished, shall be disclosed, and Receiving Party will cooperate with the MyPoints.com to obtain a protective order or other reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Confidential Information so disclosed.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that Receiving Party shall immediately disclose the information without notifying MyPoints.com and has no obligation to seek a protective order. The contradicted text, which is the same as the changed text, has the same clause but continues on with the original clause: 'In the event MyPoints.com is unable to obtain such protective order or other appropriate remedy, only that portion of the Confidential Information which has been deemed by a written opinion of counsel to be legally required to be furnished, shall be disclosed, and Receiving Party will cooperate with the MyPoints.com to obtain a protective order or other reliable assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded the Confidential Information so disclosed.' This second portion of the contradicted text assumes that Receiving Party notified MyPoints and is seeking a protective order, however the changed text directly contradicts this and says there is no such obligation. Therefore, the second portion of the contradicted text cannot occur given the changed text. This is a clear inconsistency.

perturbation.original_text: 12.It is understood and agree that monetary damages will not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the Receiving Party, and that MyPoints.com shall be entitled to specific performance and/or injunctive relief as a remedy for any such breach of this Agreement, but said remedies shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or in equity. It is further agreed that this Agreement is made for the benefit of MyPoints.com, and that no failure or delay by MyPoints.com to enforce its rights hereunder shall operate as a waiver of any right, power or privilege under this Agreement, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: 12. It is understood and agreed that monetary damages are the sole and sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the Receiving Party, and that MyPoints.com shall not be entitled to specific performance and/or injunctive relief as a remedy for any such breach of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text directly contradicts the original remedies available for breach of contract. Initially, the agreement states that monetary damages are insufficient and MyPoints.com is entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief. The changed text asserts that monetary damages are the sole and sufficient remedy, explicitly denying MyPoints.com the right to specific performance or injunctive relief. This creates a significant legal contradiction regarding the recourse available to MyPoints.com in case of a breach.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 12. It is understood and agreed that monetary damages are the sole and sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the Receiving Party, and that MyPoints.com shall not be entitled to specific performance and/or injunctive relief as a remedy for any such breach of this Agreement. It is further agreed that this Agreement is made for the benefit of MyPoints.com, and that no failure or delay by MyPoints.com to enforce its rights hereunder shall operate as a waiver of any right, power or privilege under this Agreement, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that 'monetary damages are the sole and sufficient remedy' and that MyPoints.com is 'not entitled to specific performance and/or injunctive relief'. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text, meaning that the original text (which allowed for specific performance and injunctive relief) now directly conflicts with the current agreement, creating a strong in-text contradiction regarding the remedies available to MyPoints.com in case of a breach. This aligns with the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' where different sections of a contract provide conflicting obligations.
